seed_rate.notes: 15-20 kg/ha for Kharif sowing; Rabi sowing may require 22-25 kg/ha.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-aerated sandy loam to clayey loam soils with pH 6.5-7.5.

irrigation.notes: Critical moisture stage. Moisture stress leads to flower drop.
Ensure sufficient moisture during pod elongation and seed filling.

fertilizer.notes: Legume crop requires lower nitrogen basal dressing due to rhizobium root nodule fixation.

maturity_indicators: Pods turn dark brown or blackish-grey
Leaves dry up and shed from the plant
harvest.harvest_method: Scything or pulling up entire plants manually
harvest.notes: Thresh harvested crop after 3-4 days of sun drying.
